AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,629.92 FILED BY ALVINO, MARNI ALVINO, VANESSA AS TO DEFENDANT BOVE, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
